metadata.description: Open-source DevOps & cross-device debugging skills for Claude Code. Eight composable plugins spanning SSH transport, safety-first audit, remote host debugging, Kubernetes, Docker, multi-source log aggregation, Terraform state, and CI/CD pipelines.

plugins.name: ssh-core
plugins.description: SSH primitives — persistent daemon connections, cluster broadcast, port-forward tunnels, and direct server-to-server transfer. The fast lane.

plugins.name: ssh-guarded
plugins.description: Safety-first SSH operations — request/execute two-phase writes, redacted output by default, workdir sandbox, detached long-running jobs. The slow lane.

plugins.name: remote-debug
plugins.description: Cross-device debugging playbook — symptom → root-cause decision trees, incident response workflow, Linux/network diagnostics, runbook templates.

plugins.name: k8s-debug
plugins.description: Kubernetes diagnostic playbook — Pod/Deployment/Service/Namespace issues, CrashLoopBackOff, OOMKilled, ImagePullBackOff, Helm release health. Read-only.

plugins.name: docker-quick
plugins.description: Docker / container diagnostic playbook — exit codes, restart loops, image bloat, Compose stack health. Read-only inspect.

plugins.name: log-aggregator
plugins.description: Multi-source log aggregation and correlation across hosts, containers, Pods, and files. Tail, correlate by trace-id/time-window, grep across sources.

plugins.name: iac-state
plugins.description: Terraform / OpenTofu state diagnostic playbook — state lock, drift detection, module audit. Read-only.

plugins.name: cicd-debug
plugins.description: CI/CD pipeline diagnostic playbook for GitHub Actions and GitLab CI — failed jobs, runner pool health, secret scope audit.
